positive: A minimalist, whimsical line art illustration of a cosmic sloth hanging from a crescent moon, surrounded by bioluminescent nebula clouds and stylized constellations. The sloth has a relaxed, sleepy expression, rendered in elegant continuous line work. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, creating a strong, iconic silhouette. Utilize deep indigo, ethereal teal, and glowing gold accents against a solid, off-black background. High contrast, clean linework, vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing, highly detailed, whimsical, spiritual, nature and space merging.
